authentication.description: Optional Bearer token. Public lane works without auth (bounded by HC_MCP_MAX_INFLIGHT). Authenticated requests with Authorization: Bearer tzk_... unlock per-plan rate limits matching the HTTP API ladder.

apiKey.title: TinyZKP API key
apiKey.description: Optional. Get a free key at https://tinyzkp.com/signup (100 proofs/month, no credit card). Without a key, the public lane is bounded by a global concurrency cap.

tools.name: describe_template
tools.description: Get full parameter schema and example JSON for a specific proof template. Call this before prove_template to understand what parameters are needed.

template_id.description: Template ID to describe. Call list_templates to see available IDs.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: Get server capabilities, version, and recommended workflow. Start here if you're unsure what this server can do.

tools.name: get_proof
tools.description: Retrieve the base64-encoded proof bytes for a completed job. Pass the result to verify_proof for independent verification.

job_id.description: Job ID of a completed proof job.

tools.name: get_proof_summary
tools.description: Get a human-readable summary of what a proof job attests to, including template, public inputs, and status.

job_id.description: Job ID of a completed proof job.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all available proof templates with IDs, summaries, and tags. Use this to discover what kinds of proofs you can generate.

tools.name: list_workloads
tools.description: List all registered workload IDs. Workloads are predefined proof programs.

tools.name: poll_job
tools.description: Check the status of a proof job. Returns: pending, running, succeeded, or failed.

job_id.description: Job ID returned by prove_template or prove_workload.

tools.name: prove_template
tools.description: Generate a zero-knowledge proof from a template ID and parameters. Returns a job_id — call poll_job to check progress. Consumes one proof from your monthly quota.

parameters.description: Template parameters as JSON object. Call describe_template for the parameter schema.

template_id.description: Template ID. Call list_templates to see available options.

zk.description: Enable zero-knowledge mode. Default: use template recommendation.

tools.name: prove_workload
tools.description: Generate a proof from a registered workload ID. Returns a job_id — call poll_job to check progress. Consumes one proof from your monthly quota.

block_size.description: Block size for the prover (power of 2). Default: 2.

workload_id.description: Registered workload ID. Call list_workloads to see available options.

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Verify a proof independently. Pass the base64-encoded proof from get_proof. Returns {valid: true/false}. This is a pure cryptographic check — no quota consumed.

metadata.displayName: TinyZKP — Verifiable Receipts for AI Agents
metadata.description: Mint zero-knowledge proofs as a tool call. Six production templates (range, hash preimage, computation attestation, accumulator, policy compliance, data integrity) plus two preview-tier extensions (zkml, spartan). Free 100 proofs/month, no credit card.
